title: gastrochilus stramineus
intro: Gastrochilus stramineus, also known as the Striped Dendrobium, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda and Unani systems, for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus stramineus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Gastrochilus stramineus is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a powder or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
